description_long: This is a three-seater sofa with a sleek, modern design, upholstered in dark brown leather or leather-like material. The sofa features three individual seat and back cushions, each with a uniform, boxy shape and subtle seam detailing. The armrests are straight, squared, and padded, matching the height of the backrest and providing a clean, contemporary profile. The legs are short, cylindrical, and dark, positioned at the corners for stability and minimal visual distraction. The back of the sofa is fully upholstered and flat, with no visible tufting or decorative elements. The overall appearance is polished and professional, suitable for urban environments such as lobbies, waiting areas, or upscale outdoor lounges.
description: A modern, dark brown leather three-seater sofa with straight armrests, boxy cushions, and short cylindrical legs. Its clean lines and polished finish make it ideal for urban settings.
description_view_0: Front view showing three uniform seat and back cushions, straight padded armrests, and the sofa's inviting seating area.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the straight, padded armrest and the sofa's boxy profile.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the flat, fully upholstered back with no decorative elements.
description_view_3: Opposite side view mirroring the straight armrest and boxy silhouette.
attribute_cushion_arrangement: Three individual, uniform seat cushions and three matching back cushions, all boxy and attached, with no visible variation in size or arrangement.
attribute_armrest_style: Straight, squared, and padded armrests at each end, matching the height of the backrest and featuring a clean, modern profile with no decorative elements.
attribute_leg_design: Four short, cylindrical legs, likely made of wood or metal, positioned at the corners and finished in a dark color, minimally visible and unobtrusive.
attribute_backrest_type: Medium-height, straight backrest with three attached, boxy cushions, continuous across the width, and no tufting or decorative features.
attribute_upholstery_pattern: Solid dark brown leather or leather-like upholstery with a smooth, glossy finish and subtle seam detailing; no visible patterns or decorative stitching.
